text:
Created attachment 170671
patch

testbuilds on 11a, 10.3a+i, 9.3a are fine, portlint is happy.

- changes RUN_DEPENDS from bind99 to bind910
- other bug fixes
- Bug fix in BIND version parsing (9.10.0 was parsed as 9.1.0)
- Option -e in keygen is removed

TODO: fix build/dependencies for zkt-delegate
